headline: Public Storage (PSA) Expands Into Canada With the Acquisition of Public Storage Canada
summary: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) ranks among the best real estate and realty stocks to invest in according to hedge funds. On June 22, UBS restated its Neutral rating on Public Storage (NYSE:PSA), with a $314 price objective. Given present-day sluggish demand circumstances, the firm anticipates that the company’s non-same-store pool will be the key growth catalyst […]
